name: Malibu 2pk Acacia Wood Adirondack Chairs - Gray - Christopher Knight Home
description: Enjoy watching the birds play with these cushioned folding Christopher Knight Home Malibu 2 pk Acacia Wood Adirondack Chairs. These chairs will allow you to relax in the great outdoor while still remaining comfortably seated upon extra plush cushions. In addition to their comfort, you can also fold both the chairs and cushions for easy storage in almost any place, allowing you to relax when you want to, and enjoy the beauty of your backyard chair free when you so choose.
